title: Senior Manager (Grant Partnership)
description:
Avensys is a reputed global IT professional services company headquartered in Singapore. Our service spectrum includes enterprise solution consulting, business intelligence, business process automation and managed services. Given our decade of success we have evolved to become one of the top trusted providers in Singapore and service a client base across banking and financial services, insurance, information technology, healthcare, retail and supply chain.

We are hiring a Senior Manager (Grant Partnership) with experience in cross-functional, international environments. This role offers strong growth opportunities and a healthy work–life balance. More details as below:

Key Duties & Responsibilities

  • Drive the activities in grant business partnership and quality management, mainly for programmes funded by the SkillsFuture Singapore (SSG) grant. Grant business partnership involves engaging with internal and external stakeholders, as well as managing grant administration and governance. Quality management covers the full courseware lifecycle, from submission through training delivery (and includes audits and assessments), to ensure quality assurance for Continuing and Education Training (CET) courses.
  • Be responsible for the preparations of reports and presentations as required for submission to University and SCALE Management, Government funding agencies, etc.
  • Liaise with funding agencies on all matters related to grants received by SCALE.
  • Be responsible for claims submission activities, including gathering claim details and ensuring successful submission to funding agencies’ portals, such as the SSG Funding Management System.
  • Lead continuous improvement projects to ramp up productivity and operational efficiency.
  • Develop, cultivate and promote positive stakeholder engagement practices to continuously improve stakeholders’ experience.

Job Requirements:

  • At least 8 years of related working experience in the education industry, with a good understanding of the Singapore CET landscape.
  • Prior experience managing Government-funded grants, especially SSG grants, would be advantageous.
  • Energetic and skilled people manager, adept at leading teams towards achieving common objectives in a fast-paced and challenging work setting.
  • Proven leadership skills to inspire, galvanise and engage staff members at all levels and with external stakeholders, functioning effectively in a complex, uncertain and ambiguous environment.
  • Excellent interpersonal and communication (verbal & written) skills.
  • Results-driven, self-motivated and highly disciplined.
  • Strong team player, and able to work collaboratively with various stakeholders to achieve desired outcomes.
  • Resilient, resourceful with good problem-solving and critical-thinking skills, and thrives in a fast-paced, results-oriented and ambiguous work environment.



If you are interested kindly share you latest resume.

WHAT’S ON OFFER:

You will be remunerated with an excellent base salary and entitled to attractive company benefits. Additionally, you will get the opportunity to enjoy a fun and collaborative work environment, alongside a strong career progression

To submit your application, please apply online or email your UPDATED CV in Microsoft Word format to swathi@aven-sys.com Your interest will be treated with strict confidentiality.

CONSULTANT DETAILS:

Consultant Name : Swathi

Avensys Consulting Pte Ltd

EA Licence 12C5759

Privacy Statement: Data collected will be used for recruitment purposes only. Personal data provided will be used strictly in accordance with the relevant data protection law and Avensys' privacy policy

Since inception, Avensys has helped clients use IT more efficiently to improve their operations and profitability, focus on core competencies and achieve business results such as increased agility, innovation and profitable growth. Our in-depth technical knowledge coupled with industry experience and our unique methodologies enable us to successfully deliver and meet our customer’s expectations.
